quotes.text: 高三拼的不是智商，是体力和意志力。能坚持到最后的人就赢了。
quotes.text_en: Senior year isn't about IQ — it's about stamina and willpower. Those who persist to the end win.
quotes.context: 鼓励高三考生坚持备考

quotes.text: 不要用战术上的勤奋掩盖战略上的懒惰。方向比努力重要。
quotes.text_en: Don't use tactical diligence to mask strategic laziness. Direction matters more than effort.
quotes.context: 强调学习方法和方向选择的重要性

quotes.text: 别感动自己。你坐在书桌前12个小时，真正有效学习可能只有4个小时。提高效率比拼时长重要。
quotes.text_en: Don't just impress yourself. You sit at your desk for 12 hours, but your effective study time might only be 4 hours. Improving efficiency matters more than clocking hours.

quotes.text: 数学是拉开差距的科目。数学好的人，选专业范围比别人大一倍。
quotes.text_en: Math is the subject that creates the biggest gaps. People good at math have twice the range of major choices.
quotes.context: 强调数学成绩的重要性

quotes.text: 与其花时间把优势科目从140提到145，不如把劣势科目从80提到100。补短板比拔高更划算。
quotes.text_en: Rather than spending time raising your best subject from 140 to 145, raise your weakest from 80 to 100. Fixing weaknesses is more cost-effective than maximizing strengths.

quotes.text: 考试的时候心态占一半。平时700分的水平，心态崩了只能考600。练心态跟练题一样重要。
quotes.text_en: Mindset accounts for half of exam performance. A 700-level student with a broken mindset can only score 600. Training your mindset is as important as practicing questions.
quotes.context: 强调考试心态的重要性

quotes.text: 模拟考考砸了是好事。高考前把问题暴露出来，总比高考的时候暴露强。
quotes.text_en: Bombing a practice exam is a good thing. It's better to expose problems before the gaokao than during it.
quotes.context: 安慰模拟考失利的考生

quotes.text: 时间管理就是命运管理。你每天浪费两小时刷手机，一年就是730小时，够你多考50分了。
quotes.text_en: Time management is destiny management. Wasting two hours daily on your phone means 730 hours a year — enough to boost your score by 50 points.

quotes.text: 错题本是最好的复习资料，没有之一。你做过的错题就是你的知识漏洞，反复看它比刷新题有用十倍。
quotes.text_en: Your error notebook is the best study material — bar none. Your past mistakes are your knowledge gaps; reviewing them is ten times more useful than doing new problems.

quotes.text: 高三别熬夜。你以为你在拼命，其实你在透支。第二天上课犯困，得不偿失。
quotes.text_en: Don't stay up late in senior year. You think you're pushing hard, but you're actually depleting yourself. Drowsy in class the next day — it's not worth it.
quotes.context: 提醒考生注意身体健康和作息

quotes.text: 最后一个月别学新知识了，把会的东西巩固到滚瓜烂熟。高考考的是你会的，不是你不会的。
quotes.text_en: In the last month, stop learning new material — consolidate what you know until it's second nature. The gaokao tests what you know, not what you don't.
quotes.context: 高考最后冲刺阶段建议

quotes.text: 到了大学，没人管你了。自律的人上天堂，放纵的人下地狱。大学四年荒废了，比没上大学还惨。
quotes.text_en: In university, nobody supervises you. Self-disciplined people go to heaven; indulgent ones go to hell. Waste four years of college and you're worse off than if you hadn't gone.
quotes.context: 警示大学生自律的重要性
